items.title: Opus 4.7 (fast mode) is now available in Windsurf
items.description: Claude Opus 4.7 (fast mode) is now available in Windsurf with the full intelligence of Opus 4.7 and ~2.5x higher output speeds.

items.title: Fast and Comprehensive Code Review, Now in Windsurf
items.description: Devin Review and Quick Review bring verification into the same workspace where you write code.

items.title: Windsurf 2.0: Introducing the Agent Command Center and Devin in Windsurf
items.description: Ship more with local and cloud agents working together.

items.title: Introducing Adaptive: a smarter way to use Windsurf
items.description: We're launching multiple updates to Windsurf today: an Adaptive model router, a redesigned model picker with pricing context, and the removal of daily limits for Max.

items.title: Introducing our new Windsurf pricing plans
items.description: We're simplifying Windsurf pricing across Free, Pro, and Teams alongside launching a new Max plan for our power users. The new plans replace the current credit-based system with industry-standard quo…

items.title: GPT-5.4 is now available in Windsurf
items.description: GPT-5.4 is now available in Windsurf with multiple reasoning effort levels. For a limited time, self serve users enjoy promotional pricing starting at 1x credits.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro is now available in Windsurf
items.description: Gemini 3.1 Pro is now available in Windsurf with Low and High thinking variants. For a limited time, enjoy promotional pricing on credit usage.

items.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is now available in Windsurf
items.description: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users: 2x credits without thinking and 3x credits with thinking.

items.title: GLM-5 and Minimax M2.5 are now available in Windsurf
items.description: GLM-5 from Zhipu AI and Minimax M2.5 are now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing. Both models are included in Arena Mode's Frontier Arena and Hybrid Arena battle groups.

items.title: GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark is now available in Windsurf
items.description: OpenAI's GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark, an ultra-fast model optimized for real-time coding, is now available in Windsurf's Arena Mode Fast and Hybrid battle groups.
